title: The Abyss Lake
lines: You slip past the groaning ice monoliths, your breath hitching as you emerge into a cyclopean, unlit cavern that seems to actively swallow the meager light from your torch. The scale of this space defies the laws of geology.

Stretching into the lightless gloom is an inky, obsidian lake. Massive, unseen entities move beneath the glassy surface, causing huge, rhythmic ripples that pulse with a slow, biological cadence—like the heartbeat of a sleeping, aquatic god.
A treacherous, narrow stone ledge—slick with ancient, bioluminescent slime—clings to the jagged cavern wall, encircling the black water like the rim of a gargantuan sacrificial bowl.

options.desc: 1. Inch carefully around the ledge toward the distant, pulsing shrine
2. Attempt to find a path back toward the surface
3. Toss a stone into the center of the obsidian lake
